public_metrics.review_invitation_note: Trustpilot indicated that the company asks customers for reviews.

observations.what_customers_say: Some reviewers describe the sales process as too focused on closing or creating urgency before they feel ready.
observations.decision_relevance: A hesitant buyer may interpret another strong closing push as pressure rather than help.

observations.what_customers_say: A subset of customers reacts to the interpersonal tone of the conversation, including whether the interaction feels appropriately formal.
observations.decision_relevance: For German homeowners, tone can influence trust before the technical quote is evaluated.

observations.what_customers_say: Trust drops when customers are unsure who is contacting them or whether a conversation is neutral advice or sales.
observations.decision_relevance: A follow-up after the quote should make the sender, purpose, and next step obvious.

observations.what_customers_say: Positive reviewers often use broad reliability language when the process feels organized and predictable.
observations.decision_relevance: Reliability proof can matter for buyers who worry about handoffs after signing.

observations.what_customers_say: The same source contains strong praise and strong criticism, with both five-star and one-star experiences visible.
observations.decision_relevance: The data is useful for identifying possible buyer concerns, but not for ranking how common those concerns are.

observations.what_customers_say: Full-service solar propositions create expectations that the provider will coordinate many steps after signature.
observations.decision_relevance: Buyers may need clear boundaries on what is included before they trust a package offer.

cross_source_notes: Pressure and tone concerns also appear in other German solar review surfaces.
The source is large enough to show varied language, but still self-selected.
caveats: Trustpilot reviews are self-selected and may be invited.
Public review metrics change over time.
Provider-specific feedback should not be generalized to another installer.
